rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in component type scopes for port-level assumptions and guarantees, and in implementation scopes for subcomponent bindings.
Use annex agree {** ... **}; blocks for AGREE contract syntax and ensure type consistency in expressions.
generic_rules: Component type annexes are for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations; implementation annexes are for assignments.
Generated AGREE code must preserve AADL scope and type consistency.
Avoid using package-qualified identifiers not present in the model.
Do not introduce AADL property names as AGREE variables unless explicitly exposed.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts use assume/guarantee syntax with labeled expressions.
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations and nested if-then-else for branching logic.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless typed ports or constants are available.
